description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a rounded, slightly asymmetrical shape and a short, curved brown stem protruding from the top. The skin displays a blend of red and yellow hues, with the red coloration more dominant on one side and subtle streaks and speckles throughout. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in several areas, and the apple appears firm and fresh. There are no visible blemishes, cuts, or stickers on the skin. The apple's coloration and texture suggest it is ripe and ready to eat. Its size and appearance are typical of apples found in urban markets or parks.
description: A round, glossy apple with red and yellow streaked skin and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Red and yellow streaked apple with stem centered, more yellow visible.
description_view_1: Mostly red side with speckled texture, stem angled to the right.
description_view_2: Balanced red and yellow hues, stem curves left, smooth surface.
description_view_3: Predominantly yellow side with faint red streaks, stem visible.
